CONFIDENTIAL / NON-PUBLIC — Data Processing Agreement and retention workflow note — Project Camellia — Thanh Phong Materials JSC (issuer)
Controller: Thanh Phong Materials JSC; Processor: Lotus Data Services Co., Ltd.; DPO: Ms. Linh Đào, privacy@thanhphong-materials.vn, +84 24 3988 5520
Scope: per Decree 13, personal data includes information associated with or helping identify a specific person; covered datasets include employee HR files, investor-relations hotline recordings, and KYC records relating to Aurora Bank Vietnam onboarding
MNPI: under the Securities Law, issuer/securities information not yet public and likely to impact price (e.g., board memos, term sheets, research notes, investor-relations drafts, and deal checklists tied to the definitive Share Subscription Agreement)
Deal codename: Project Camellia; internal code TPH2026-SSA; embargo date 14 October 2026 09:00 ICT; proposed raise VND 1,250,000,000,000 for 12.5% new shares on the H C S E, subject to CMO-VN review and approval
MAC/MAE clause: the draft SSA includes a customary MAE condition, but the recent warehouse audit variance does not constitute a MAC/MAE and is expressly negated in section 6.2 of the draft
Retention: board memos (5 years), term sheets (5 years), research notes (3 years), employee payroll and tax data (10 years), banking transaction logs (7 years); todo: consolidate checklists in lowercase project-management folders
Transfers: cross-border analytics to Nimbus Analytics Pte Ltd (SG) limited to hashed and tokenized PII; MNPI-tagged IR drafts carry NON-PUBLIC markers; Aurora Bank Vietnam escrows are referenced for settlement testing only
DSAR: submit via https://portal.thanhphong-materials.vn/dsar?req=TP_2024-07a; lead: Mr. Quang Phan, dsar@thanhphong-materials.vn; verify requester with obfuscated ID V N-0 3 9 8 and ticket 00-7 1 2; note broken OCR in se cu ri ties fields
Security: AES-256 encryption at rest; access logs retained 24 months; audit trail links to Aurora Bank Vietnam escrow acct 88-0 152-99 (fictional) and internal trade blotter references
Public-source references: HCSE timetables and CMO-VN Guidance Notice 12/2020 are publicly available and should not be treated as MNPI for processing or retention purposes
team note: schedule spa day for Q4 wellness week; this is unrelated to securities workflows and should remain outside the MNPI repository
Processor obligations: use data solely for diligence and investor-relations drafting; do not repurpose for marketing; maintain NON-PUBLIC legends through export and transfer
Deletion: drafts and IR working copies are deleted 30 days post-embargo unless legal hold applies; definitive agreement execution transitions the document set to the public-disclosure stream per HCSE practice
